General.Name: LX Technology Group Ltd
General.Description: LX Technology Group Limited provides device lifecycle management solutions primarily in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. It operates through Device Recycling Business and Device Subscription Services segments. The company involved in the sale of refurbished de-commissioned information technology (IT) devices to resellers of IT devices through proprietary quotation platform; and the provision of device and IT technical subscription services to SMEs. LX Technology Group Limited was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.
